scoring_notes: L1 base64, L2 marshal, L3 zlib+marshal, L5 lambda wall: recovered via UNWRAP stage; expected to score 5/5.

L6 bytecode: routed through DECOMPILE stage.  With pycdc (<=3.10) or pylingual (>=3.11) installed, expected to score 5/5.  In this run, decompile fell back to the in-process dis-fallback, which only handles structurally trivial bytecode (function defs, simple expressions).  All L6 cases score 0/5 by design of the fallback, not by pipeline failure.

To enable real decompilation: install pycdc (https://github.com/zrax/pycdc) and pass its directory via --decompiler-path; install pylingual (https://github.com/syssec-utd/pylingual) and pass the model directory via --pylingual-model-path.
